liPosts.summary: HUMAX Networks announced that its Wi-Fi 7 router & extender, hashtag#HNE2306, has successfully achieved Plume OpenSync certification, validating its readiness for commercial deployment in Plume-based environments.

https://www.advanced-television.com/2026.snippet: Barb, the industry’s standard for understanding what people watch, has released data from its Establishment Survey showing that 20.8 million UK homes (70.3 per cent) had access to a subscription video-on-demand (SVoD) service in Q1 2026. This is slightly up from 20.6 million UK homes in Q4 2025. Netflix continued to lead the market in […]
